'''''The Scarlet Pirate''''' was an episodic [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] serial that aired its finale on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:21<ref name="HNN" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> As advertised by that [[Standard day/Legends|day's]] issue of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News']] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]], concluding installment was broadcast on Feed LFN422 at 2120.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
''The Scarlet Pirate'' was mentioned on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] in the [[in-universe]] issue ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 51]]'', which was published<ref name="HNN" /> on [[April 11]], [[2002]],<ref name="HNN51 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6401165|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=MattPeriolat|date=2002-04-11|time=6:19 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> and written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
